message:
fix(hedge): clippy lint suppression and sliding window test correction

adaptive_hedge.rs:
  Add clippy::cast_precision_loss to the allow list on decay_nanos()
  since the u64→f64 conversion is intentional for Peak-EWMA decay.
  Add inline comment explaining the fractional decay rationale.
  Reformat assertion to single line.

hedge.rs:
  Fix test_adaptive_hedge_policy_uses_sliding_window_latest_samples
  to use window=10, samples=1..=20 (was window=5, samples=1..=10).
  The original test had window==sample count so it never actually
  tested sliding eviction. With 20 samples into a 10-slot window,
  the retained samples are [11..=20], rank=6 (zero-indexed 5),
  yielding 16ms — properly exercising the sliding window logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
